art_briefs.dall_e_prompt: Three-panel evidence document scan collage arranged side by side on a neutral evidence lab surface. Left panel: a building courier intake slip form with handwritten signature 'D. Center panel: a building package receipt log page with printed tabular rows showing February 28 package entries, rows visible, slightly crumpled edges. Right panel: a visitor sign-in log page showing February 28 entries with a visible gap — a line where an entry should appear but is blank. Each document has a small yellow MPD evidence adhesive label in the corner. Slight scanner distortion and paper texture visible. photorealistic, shot on Canon EOS R5, flat even overhead document lighting, no illustration, no cartoon, no anime, no vector art, no watermark, no painting style
